name: healthcare_mutual_aid_request_conflicts_cedar_jus_mer
premise: PACU is holding ventilated patients while a generator test failed; biorepository telemetry is creeping toward out-of-spec. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare mutual aid request conflicts cedar jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Pharmacy and legal disagree on whether a one-time override can be issued before the next MAR administration cycle. Framing has already hardened externally as justice against mercy; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Keisha Park
agents.identity: I am Keisha Park, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Camila Vasquez, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so mercy does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so justice does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Keisha Park must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Keisha Park do?
